::: {.callout-tip .student-checklist appearance="simple"}
## Due this week

- Questions: due Tuesday 3:00pm.
- Assignment: due Friday 5:00pm.
- Project: update your weekly progress issue.

Submit by pull request to the [assignments repo](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments). Details: [Submit](../turn-in.qmd) · [Rubric](../rubric.qmd)
:::
